authority_tiers.S: Primary source: official company, research venue, government, regulatory, or formal filing source.
authority_tiers.A: Authoritative validation source: model hub, benchmark, leaderboard, or public dataset with traceable methods.
authority_tiers.B: Discovery and market-intelligence source: useful for leads, adoption, reviews, funding, or product discovery.
authority_tiers.C: Community source: use for early detection only; confirm with S or A sources before publishing as fact.

sources.name: GitHub Changelog
sources.verification_rule: Use for GitHub platform and Copilot-adjacent product changes; confirm major Copilot model claims with product pages or release notes.

sources.name: GitHub Copilot What's New
sources.verification_rule: Use for Copilot feature availability, product positioning, and preview announcements.

sources.name: OpenAI News
sources.verification_rule: Use as primary source for OpenAI model, product, safety, and partnership announcements.

sources.name: OpenAI API Changelog
sources.verification_rule: Use for API surface, developer platform, and model availability changes.

sources.name: OpenAI Model Release Notes
sources.verification_rule: Use for OpenAI model-level changes; pair with API docs for developer availability.

sources.name: OpenAI Sora
sources.verification_rule: Use for Sora capabilities and official product status; verify availability with current OpenAI release notes.

sources.name: Claude Platform Release Notes
sources.verification_rule: Use for Anthropic API and platform changes; pair with Claude app notes for consumer features.

sources.name: Claude Release Notes
sources.verification_rule: Use for Claude app and model updates; confirm API availability through platform release notes.

sources.name: Claude Code Changelog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Claude Code CLI feature and behavior changes.

sources.name: Gemini API Changelog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Gemini API model and developer platform changes.

sources.name: Google DeepMind News
sources.verification_rule: Use for Google DeepMind research, model, responsibility, and product announcements.

sources.name: Google AI Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Google AI product and ecosystem announcements.

sources.name: Cursor Changelog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Cursor IDE, agent, SDK, and product changes.

sources.name: Replit Changelog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Replit Agent and product updates; prefer current updates index when integrating.

sources.name: SWE-bench
sources.verification_rule: Use for software engineering agent benchmark claims; note whether result is Verified, Lite, or another split.

sources.name: LiveCodeBench
sources.verification_rule: Use for code-generation and self-repair benchmark movement; record benchmark version or date window.

sources.name: Aider LLM Leaderboards
sources.verification_rule: Use for edit-in-place coding performance; keep benchmark name and methodology with each signal.

sources.name: Adobe News
sources.verification_rule: Use for Firefly and Adobe creative AI launches, partnerships, and enterprise positioning.

sources.name: Adobe Firefly Runway Partner Model Page
sources.verification_rule: Use for Adobe-hosted Runway model availability in Firefly workflows.

sources.name: Black Forest Labs Announcements
sources.verification_rule: Use for FLUX model, API, open-weight, safety, and partnership announcements.

sources.name: Hugging Face Model Cards
sources.verification_rule: Use model cards for model metadata and intended use; verify claims against linked papers or official repos.

sources.name: Artificial Analysis Text-to-Image Leaderboard
sources.verification_rule: Use for comparative image model performance; include leaderboard date because rankings change.

sources.name: Artificial Analysis Text-to-Video Leaderboard
sources.verification_rule: Use for text-to-video comparison; include leaderboard date and whether audio is included.

sources.name: Artificial Analysis Image-to-Video Leaderboard
sources.verification_rule: Use for image-to-video comparison; include leaderboard date and model variant.

sources.name: VBench
sources.verification_rule: Use for video generation quality dimensions; include benchmark version when publishing.

sources.name: Luma AI News
sources.verification_rule: Use for Luma Ray and Dream Machine release claims.

sources.name: Runway Research
sources.verification_rule: Use for Runway model releases and capability claims; compare benchmark claims with independent leaderboards.

sources.name: Pika FAQ
sources.verification_rule: Use for current Pika model capabilities and product constraints.

sources.name: arXiv API
sources.verification_rule: Use for preprint discovery; classify with arXiv categories and avoid treating unreviewed papers as settled findings.

sources.name: arXiv Category Taxonomy
sources.verification_rule: Use for category mapping such as cs.AI, cs.CL, cs.CV, cs.LG, and stat.ML.

sources.name: arXiv cs.CV
sources.verification_rule: Use for computer vision, image, and video preprints; verify high-impact claims through code, benchmarks, or proceedings.

sources.name: OpenReview
sources.verification_rule: Use for ICLR, ICML workshops, NeurIPS tracks, and active peer-review status; store venue and decision status.

sources.name: ACL Anthology
sources.verification_rule: Use for computational linguistics and NLP papers from ACL venues.

sources.name: CVF Open Access
sources.verification_rule: Use for CVPR, ICCV, ECCV open-access papers and accepted versions.

sources.name: Proceedings of Machine Learning Research
sources.verification_rule: Use for ICML and other ML conference proceedings published through PMLR.

sources.name: NeurIPS Proceedings
sources.verification_rule: Use for accepted NeurIPS papers and dataset/benchmark tracks.

sources.name: Hugging Face Papers
sources.verification_rule: Use for trending paper discovery and linked repos; confirm paper details through arXiv, OpenReview, or proceedings.

sources.name: Meta Llama
sources.verification_rule: Use for official Llama model availability, downloads, and product positioning.

sources.name: Mistral AI News
sources.verification_rule: Use for Mistral model, product, research, and company updates.

sources.name: Mistral Docs Changelog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Mistral API, model release, and platform changes.

sources.name: Cohere Release Notes
sources.verification_rule: Use for Cohere model and API release notes.

sources.name: DeepSeek News
sources.verification_rule: Use for official DeepSeek model and API releases; prefer current news index when integrating.

sources.name: Qwen on Hugging Face
sources.verification_rule: Use for Qwen model releases and model-card metadata; confirm strategic claims through Qwen blog or Alibaba Cloud pages.

sources.name: Hugging Face Hub
sources.verification_rule: Use for public model, dataset, and space metadata; treat popularity metrics as adoption signals, not quality proof.

sources.name: Artificial Analysis Models Leaderboard
sources.verification_rule: Use for model quality, speed, price, and context comparison; include retrieval date.

sources.name: LMArena Leaderboard
sources.verification_rule: Use for preference-based model comparisons; avoid treating ranking alone as a factual capability claim.

sources.name: Epoch AI Benchmarks
sources.verification_rule: Use for capability trends and benchmark aggregation; store benchmark name and evaluation source.

sources.name: SEC EDGAR APIs
sources.verification_rule: Use for public-company filings and structured XBRL data; cite form type and filing date.

sources.name: SEC Filings Search
sources.verification_rule: Use for 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, S-1, and other filing discovery.

sources.name: Crunchbase Data
sources.verification_rule: Use for funding and firmographic leads; confirm major funding rounds with company announcement or filings when available.

sources.name: CB Insights AI 100
sources.verification_rule: Use for startup discovery and categorization; verify company-specific claims through primary sources.

sources.name: Stanford AI Index
sources.verification_rule: Use for macro AI investment, adoption, research, and policy trend context; record report year.

sources.name: OECD.AI Policy Observatory
sources.verification_rule: Use for AI policy, national initiatives, and live trend data; cite dataset or policy entry.

sources.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
sources.verification_rule: Use for AI risk, governance, and safety framework updates.

sources.name: EU General-Purpose AI Code of Practice
sources.verification_rule: Use for EU AI Act GPAI obligations, signatories, and compliance guidance.

sources.name: AI.gov
sources.verification_rule: Use for U.S. AI strategy and federal policy direction; verify specific actions with White House or agency pages.

sources.name: Product Hunt
sources.verification_rule: Use for new product discovery and launch momentum; confirm facts on official product website.

sources.name: Product Hunt API
sources.verification_rule: Use public GraphQL API for launch metadata; check API usage restrictions before commercial use.

sources.name: GitHub Trending
sources.verification_rule: Use for open-source project discovery; verify project health through releases, commits, issues, and docs.

sources.name: GitHub REST API
sources.verification_rule: Use for repository metadata, search, topics, stars, issues, and releases; respect rate limits.

sources.name: GitHub Releases API
sources.verification_rule: Use for versioned open-source tool releases; cite tag, release date, and repo.

sources.name: G2 Artificial Intelligence Category
sources.verification_rule: Use for buyer sentiment and category position; avoid treating reviews as technical proof.

sources.name: Chrome Web Store Developer Docs
sources.verification_rule: Use for Chrome extension publishing, platform rules, and API changes.

sources.name: GitHub AI Topics
sources.verification_rule: Use for broad AI repository discovery; verify project relevance and activity before inclusion.

sources.name: OSSInsight Trending AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for GitHub momentum discovery; confirm with GitHub repository metadata.

sources.name: NVIDIA Newsroom
sources.verification_rule: Use for NVIDIA company announcements, partnerships, AI infrastructure, AI factory, and industry deployment news; down-rank broad partnership PR unless it changes builder or market behavior.

sources.name: NVIDIA Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for NVIDIA product, AI platform, RTX AI, physical AI, robotics, creative AI, and industry ecosystem updates; verify technical claims against developer docs when possible.

sources.name: NVIDIA Developer Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for CUDA, TensorRT, NIM, NeMo, Omniverse, robotics, inference, RAG, and deployment implementation guidance; prioritize posts with reproducible workflow or developer actionability.

sources.name: NVIDIA Research
sources.verification_rule: Use for NVIDIA research areas, labs, publications, AI demos, graphics, robotics, simulation, and generative AI work; cite paper or project page for specific research claims.

sources.name: Stability AI News
sources.verification_rule: Use as a primary source for Stability AI image, video, and model announcements.

sources.name: Midjourney Updates
sources.verification_rule: Use for Midjourney image model and product update announcements.

sources.name: Ideogram Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use the official Ideogram blog index for image model and product announcements; follow linked posts for primary details.

sources.name: Leonardo.Ai News
sources.verification_rule: Use for Leonardo.Ai product, creative tooling, and image generation announcements.

sources.name: Canva Newsroom AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for Canva AI product updates and creative workflow announcements; select only AI-relevant items.

sources.name: Kling AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for English Kling AI product and model availability; confirm major claims with Kuaishou releases when available.

sources.name: Hailuo AI by MiniMax
sources.verification_rule: Use for English Hailuo AI video generation product updates from MiniMax.

sources.name: MiniMax News
sources.verification_rule: Use as a primary English source for MiniMax model, Hailuo, and product releases.

sources.name: Qwen Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Alibaba Qwen model releases including multimodal, image, video, coding, and research model updates.

sources.name: Qwen Hugging Face Organization
sources.verification_rule: Use to validate Qwen model artifacts and release timing; confirm announcements with Qwen Blog when possible.

sources.name: Tencent Hunyuan
sources.verification_rule: Use only English Hunyuan model and product pages or releases; validate video/image model claims with official Tencent or model hub pages.

sources.name: Tencent Hunyuan on Hugging Face
sources.verification_rule: Use to validate Tencent Hunyuan open model artifacts and metadata; confirm product claims with official Tencent sources.

sources.name: ByteDance Seed
sources.verification_rule: Use for English ByteDance Seed research and model updates, especially multimodal image/video generation.

sources.name: Baidu Research Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for English Baidu research and model updates; include only AI-relevant research or productized model signals.

sources.name: Baidu ERNIE Bot
sources.verification_rule: Use only English-accessible ERNIE product or model information; verify major claims against Baidu Research or official releases.

sources.name: Zhipu AI
sources.verification_rule: Use English Zhipu AI pages for GLM model and product updates; confirm open artifacts with model hub pages when available.

sources.name: Moonshot AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for English Moonshot AI model and product updates when available.

sources.name: xAI News
sources.verification_rule: Use as primary source for xAI model, product, and research announcements.

sources.name: Perplexity Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Perplexity product, model, and business updates.

sources.name: Replicate Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for model deployment, image/video model hosting, and developer tooling updates from Replicate.

sources.name: Together AI Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Together AI model serving, open model, benchmark, and developer platform announcements.

sources.name: Fireworks AI Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Fireworks AI model serving, fine-tuning, and developer platform updates.

sources.name: Groq Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Groq model serving, inference infrastructure, developer platform, and business announcements.

sources.name: Cerebras Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use for Cerebras model, inference, training infrastructure, and business announcements.

sources.name: AI21 News
sources.verification_rule: Use for AI21 model and enterprise product announcements.

sources.name: Anthropic Research
sources.verification_rule: Use for Anthropic research and safety work; connect to model/product impact only when the article states it.

sources.name: Meta AI Blog
sources.verification_rule: Use as primary source for Meta AI research, Llama, multimodal, and generative media announcements.

sources.name: Microsoft Research AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for Microsoft Research AI work; confirm productization with Microsoft product blogs when available.

sources.name: Apple Machine Learning Research
sources.verification_rule: Use for Apple ML research signals; avoid treating papers as product availability unless Apple states it.

sources.name: TechCrunch AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for business and startup discovery; confirm factual claims with primary company, filing, or product sources before publishing as final signal.

sources.name: VentureBeat AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for market and enterprise AI discovery; confirm major product or funding claims with primary sources.

sources.name: The Information AI
sources.verification_rule: Use only as market-intelligence lead when accessible; confirm with primary filings, company announcements, or non-paywalled sources.

sources.name: a16z AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for market framing and startup trend discovery; avoid treating investor commentary as primary evidence for product claims.

sources.name: Sequoia AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for AI market analysis and startup trend discovery; confirm factual company claims with primary sources.

sources.name: Notion AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for Notion AI product capabilities and availability; use changelog/blog when adapter is added.

sources.name: Figma AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for Figma AI product capability and design workflow updates; confirm announcements with Figma blog/changelog when available.

sources.name: Zapier AI
sources.verification_rule: Use for Zapier AI automation product updates and tool ecosystem signals.

sources.name: Linear Changelog
sources.verification_rule: Use only AI-related Linear feature updates and developer/productivity workflow signals.

sources.name: Atlassian Intelligence
sources.verification_rule: Use for Atlassian AI capability, trust, and enterprise deployment signals; confirm launch timing with Atlassian blog or product pages.
